reviews.comment:
Muy lindo lugar para descansar un rato lastima el minishop era imposible comprar lleno de gente

(Translated by Google)
Very nice place to rest for a while, it's a shame the mini-shop was impossible to buy anything, it was full of people

reviews.comment:
Lugar muy lindo para parar en ka ruta 2. La comida, logicamente, es la típica de estación de servicio. Bastante bien.

A very nice place to stop on Route 2. The food, naturally, is typical gas station fare. Pretty good.

A lovely spot for a stop along the way, with trees and tables. The outdoor space is very spacious.

reviews.comment:
Un parto... pedir cafe una fila.... pagar cafe, otra fila.. retirar el cafe que pediste, otra fila y ademas te salen diciendo que medialunas no tienen.. q de membrillo no tienen... ok.. deme lo q se te de la gana y punto.... el patio exterior un asco los empleados parece q arrancaron hace 10 minutos.
Las IPF comunes son mil veces mas organizados.
Menos mal que son del ACA

(Translated by Google)
A delivery... order coffee, one line... pay for coffee, another line... pick up the coffee you ordered, another line, and on top of that, they tell you they don't have any croissants... that they don't have any quince jelly... okay... give me whatever you want and that's it... the outdoor patio is disgusting; the employees look like they left 10 minutes ago.
Regular IPFs are a thousand times more organized.
Thank goodness they're from the ACA
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURYM3RhOTV3RRAB

reviews.comment:
